title: cascabela thevetia
intro: Cascabela thevetia, also known as Yellow Oleander, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and the Caribbean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. Cascabela thevetia has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to use caution and consult with a medical professional before using any parts of the plant for medicinal purposes.
